title: Items & Mechanics Classic (Re-Classic Addon)
description: This mod adds many items with various functionality, armor and more (with old textures)
body:
# Addon for re-classic! (or you can use it without modpack)

Nostalgic-look addon for Re-classic modpack with cool items, mechanics and more. This mod adheres to the old minecraft style, like old-styled textures.

For now this mod contains: 
- Copper items, armor and crafts, that may contain copper.

![Items and armor comparsion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/129f045720c1245807943472d9d6ee1d1df3bd47.png)
- Achievemnts with copper.

![Copper achievements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2558e41900bb1621efe50bed20bceb3f28887dc.png)
- Amethyst items and armor.

![Items and armor comparsion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5a5ce25adeb5583bc51e5c6effe7a53e4a4f32b.png)
- Achievemnts with amethyst.

![Amethyst achievements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7299d2374b33648172724811cd1116dec2dc0690_0.webp)

And more items in future!

- Axe re-balance: axes gain more damage if you attacking mob. You cannot spam with it.
- Shield small re-balance: when you shielding, and mob attack you, armor that you wear will get small damage every mob hit, also shield gain more damage (+1).
